calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing And Request For Default Judgment Per Ccp 585(C)
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

William K. Hackett, Esq., and Kirsten M. Ferguson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, HYDROCEPHALUS ASSOCIATION, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation,
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JEROME ACOSTA.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Judgment is hereby entered in favor of HA and against Defendant in the amount of $43,888.00. Interest shall accrue on such amount from the date hereof as prescribed by California Code of Civil Procedure Section 685.010, or any successor thereto, as applicable.

Court signed Judgment in open court.
